ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the election took place */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "dem_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the Democratic candidate */,
  "rep_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the Republican candidate */,
  "county_winner" TEXT /* Winner of the election in the county */,
  "national_winner" TEXT /* Winner of the national election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (presidential, congressional, local) */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the county */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage */,
  "dem_margin" INTEGER /* Margin of victory for the Democratic candidate */,
  "rep_margin" INTEGER /* Margin of victory for the Republican candidate */,
  "other_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for third-party or independent candidates */,
  "other_winner" TEXT /* Winner of the election if it's not a major party candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_county_name FOREIGN KEY ("county_name") REFERENCES counties ("county_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "senators" TEXT /* Names of the state's senators */,
  "representatives" TEXT /* Names of the state's representatives in the House of Representatives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the county mayor or executive */,
  "county_commissioners" TEXT /* Names of the county commissioners or council members */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the county */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the county residents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date of integration into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the election official (e.g., Secretary of State, County Clerk) */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the election official (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)
